abilities.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Adamant — If at least three white mana was spent to cast this spell, creatures you control gain vigilance until end of turn.

effect.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Adamant — If at least three white mana was spent to cast this spell, creatures you control gain vigilance until end of turn.
effect.name: PutCounterAll
